cards.duringText: If Goldhorn has 7 or more health, the value of this card is 7 instead.
cards.title: FURY OF THE PROTECTOR

cards.afterText: If Goldhorn has 7 or more health, deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: REGAINED VIGOR

cards.afterText: If Goldhorn has 4 or less health, choose a card in your discard pile and return it to your hand.
cards.title: SOUL OF THE ALPS

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, your opponent discards 1 random card.
cards.title: HUNTER'S BANE

cards.afterText: Move the opposing fighter up to 2 spaces.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: HORNS OF BLINDING LIGHT

cards.afterText: Move Goldhorn up to 5 spaces. He may move through opposing fighters.
cards.title: SPRING STEP

cards.afterText: Choose an enemy that isn't adjacent to Goldhorn. Deal 2 damage to that enemy.
cards.title: AID OF THE WHITE LADIES

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: Regroup

cards.duringText: Goldhorn cannot take more than 1 combat damage this combat.
cards.title: unmoving like  a mountain

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, draw 2 cards. If you lost the combat, your opponent draws 2 cards.
cards.title: the hoard of triglav

cards.basicText: Move Goldhorn up to 5 spaces. He may move through opposing fighters. The value of the next attack he plays this turn is 5 and cannot be changed.
cards.title: CHARGE

cards.basicText:
Draw 1 card, then choose two different effects:
- Move Goldhorn up to 3 spaces. He may move through opposing fighters.
- Goldhorn recovers 1 health.
- Gain 1 action.
cards.title: THE FLOWER OF TRIGLAV

hero.name: GOLDHORN
hero.specialAbility:
After placing Goldhorn, pick 2 starting spaces and place a Bloom token in each. 
When Goldhorn enters a space with a Bloom token, you may return him to full health. If you do, return the token to the box.

name: Goldhorn
note:
LINK TO THE FINAL FILES: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1dd15aThRlgReMoamU8g5jQQ232Gp31Fq

“The Valley of Triglav lakes and Komna plateau were once a heaven in mountains, inhabited by gracious nymphs, White ladies. But nobody was allowed to approach their domicile. Intrudors were chased away by stone avalanches, triggered by white goats, who lived on ridges above Trenta valley. They were led by Goldhorn. Some have tried to hunt him, but none succeeded. If somebody would hurt him, from his blood a miraculous balzam would grow, called the Triglav flower, and when the wounded Goldhorn would eat it, even only one single leaf, he would instantly recover. His golden horns were the key of big treasures beneath the mountain.”

Goldhorn is a solo fighter, who makes up for his extremely low hp with the ability to fully heal twice in the game, thanks to his Bloom tokens. His deck is all about managing the push and pull of the hunt, making best use of every moment, taking risks and carefully choosing the best moment to reset. The deck has been playtested and is semi-stable. 

I study illustration and am making the art for this deck myself.
